---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new capability for agent-echelon
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem

What problem are you trying to solve? Who has this problem? Why does the current behavior not work?

## Proposed Solution

A clear description of what you'd like to see added or changed.

## Alternatives Considered

Other approaches you thought about and why they don't work as well.

## Scope

- [ ] Frontend change
- [ ] Backend / CDK change
- [ ] New Lambda handler
- [ ] Documentation only
- [ ] Breaking change (requires major version bump)

## Additional Context

Screenshots, references, prior art, or related discussions.

---

**Checklist before submitting:**
- [ ] I have searched existing issues for duplicates
- [ ] I am willing to contribute a PR if this is accepted
